input.settingPrompt: A cramped frostbound warden's cell in the upper gaol of a haunted border-keep, rimed with ice and old cruelty.

keyLocations.name: The Iron Cages
keyLocations.description: a row of frozen holding cages down the corridor

keyLocations.name: The Murder Hole
keyLocations.description: a slot above the gate where boiling oil was once poured

keyLocations.name: The Warden's Stair
keyLocations.description: the spiral up to the gatehouse watch

identity.locationType: a warden's personal cell in the upper gaol of a border-keep
identity.characteristics: A cramped, narrow stone cell barely wider than its cot, every surface furred with frost and old grime; a warden once lived and worked here keeping the gaol, and the cold has preserved his cruelty along with his clutter.
identity.tone: bleak, frigid, claustrophobic and haunted, heavy with old cruelty and lonely watchfulness

floor.texture: narrow worn flagstones glazed with a thin skin of ice, grouted black with grime, scuffed pale down the center where boots have paced

ceiling.texture: a low, oppressive ceiling of cracked plaster between dark roof-beams, fringed at the corners with hoarfrost and a few hanging icicles

back.texture: fitted grey blocks sheathed in a bloom of white frost, a single narrow arrow-slit high up letting in a blade of cold grey light

front.texture: rime-streaked grey stone broken by the entry: a heavy iron-strapped oak door standing ajar, its boards swollen and frost-cracked, a rusted observation-slot set at eye height

left.texture: grey blocks veined with creeping frost, gouged with tally-scratches counting prisoners or days, stained dark at the base

right.texture: matching frosted stone, hung with rusted iron fittings and the ghost-pale outline where something long since rotted away

objects.name: Warden's Cot
objects.description: A narrow iron-framed cot pushed lengthwise against the wall, its straw tick gone grey and stiff with frost, a single threadbare blanket frozen into folds.

objects.name: Frost-Crusted Footlocker
objects.description: A low banded-iron chest at the cot's foot, its lid frozen shut, the metal furred with white rime and weeping rust at the hinges.

objects.name: Keys-and-Manacle Board
objects.description: A plank of iron hooks bolted to the wall, hung with a heavy ring of frosted gaol-keys and a dangling pair of rusted manacles.

objects.name: Iron Brazier
objects.description: A small three-legged brazier holding nothing but a heap of cold grey ash and a skin of ice, long dead and giving no warmth.

objects.name: Warden's Stool
objects.description: A squat one-legged watch-stool, its seat worn smooth and split by the cold, tipped against the wall where it was last left.

objects.name: Tallow Lantern
objects.description: A dented horn-paned lantern hanging from a beam-hook, its tallow stub frozen mid-drip, the horn clouded with frost.

objects.name: Frozen Slop-Bucket
objects.description: A battered wooden bucket in the corner, its contents frozen to a filthy solid block, a film of ice sealing the rim.

objects.name: Threadbare Floor-Rag
objects.description: A small frost-stiffened rag of a rug beside the cot, matted and grey, where bare feet once met the cold stone.

arrangementProse: The heavy oak door in the front wall stands ajar, and from the threshold the cramped cell runs away narrow and deep toward the back wall, where a single arrow-slit lets in a blade of grey light. The Warden's Cot (obj_01) is pushed lengthwise hard against the left wall, running front-to-back so it never crosses the line of sight, with the Frost-Crusted Footlocker (obj_02) set at its foot toward the back-left corner. The threadbare Floor-Rag (obj_08) lies on the floor beside the cot, half-tucked beneath its frame. Against the back wall beneath the arrow-slit sits the dead Iron Brazier (obj_04), squarely centered at the end of the room as the cell's bleak focal point. The Keys-and-Manacle Board (obj_03) is bolted to the right wall toward the back, with the squat Warden's Stool (obj_05) tipped against the right wall beneath it. The Frozen Slop-Bucket (obj_07) sits jammed into the front-right corner near the door, out of the way. Overhead, just inside the entry, the Tallow Lantern (obj_06) hangs from a beam-hook near the front of the ceiling. The strip of floor just inside the door and the central sightline back to the brazier and arrow-slit are kept clear; cot, locker, board, stool, and bucket all hug the side and back walls.

placementNotes.note: Pushed lengthwise against the left wall, running front-to-back.
At the foot of the cot, toward the back-left corner against the left wall.
Bolted to the right wall toward the back.
Against the back wall, centered beneath the arrow-slit as the focal point.
Tipped against the right wall beneath the keys-and-manacle board.
Hangs from a beam-hook on the ceiling just inside the entry.
Jammed into the front-right corner near the door.
Lies on the floor beside the cot, half-tucked beneath its frame.
